description_long: This awning is a large, rectangular structure mounted above the entrances of two adjacent commercial buildings along a busy urban street. The canopy appears to be made of a durable, weather-resistant material, likely fabric or vinyl, stretched over a rigid metal frame. The awning extends outward from the building facade, providing shade and shelter to the sidewalk and storefronts below. The canopy is primarily a solid color, with some subtle patterning or textural variation visible in the material. The edge trim of the awning is straight and clean, with no visible scalloping or decorative fringe. There is visible signage or branding on the front valance, indicating the presence of businesses beneath the awning.
description: A large, solid-colored awning with a straight edge trim, mounted above storefronts on a busy urban street. The awning features visible signage and a sturdy metal frame.
description_view_0: From this view, the awning is seen above the main entrances, with clear signage and a solid canopy covering the sidewalk.
description_view_1: This angle shows the awning's extension along the building facade and the depth of the canopy, with the support structure partially visible.
description_view_2: The side view highlights the awning's projection from the building and the straight edge trim, as well as the connection to the building wall.
description_view_3: From the rear, the awning's coverage area and its integration with the building's architecture are visible, with less emphasis on signage.
attribute_mounting_location: attached to the storefront facade above the main entrances
attribute_canopy_pattern: solid color with subtle textural variation
attribute_branding_or_signage: store name and signage on the front valance
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed metal frame attached to building facade
